notes: Case 01-7 (Andy C. Lee vs. Korean Capital Presbytery) appears in the docket list at ga29_2001 page 72. This was a complaint filed in the 2001 docket year. According to the Standing Judicial Commission report on page 72, this case was still 'in process' and had not been decided at the 29th General Assembly. No decision text or findings were included in the GA minutes. The case appears only as a mention in the case docket list, not as a completed opinion.
